message:
Remove unused sys import from PDF header analysis script

The sys module was imported but never used in analyze_header.py.
Removing to keep imports clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,6 @@
 # dependencies = ["pypdf"]
 # ///
 import pypdf
-import sys
 
 try:
     reader = pypdf.PdfReader("62451.pdf")
